calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Aug-01-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Zenophon Giannis and Monica Baltazar in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that the petition appeared to be in order, that it was prepared to grant the petition but that the matter was set to soon (4 days). An amended petition signed by Ms. Baltazar was filed on July 30, 2012. The Court granted the Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage (subject to review of the order/corrections to the order) but will sign it tomorrow.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.
